Revenue Operations


Compensation


Estimated Base Salary $120K – $170K



We value providing opportunities for professional growth, and hence, we typically refrain from offering at the upper limit of the salary range. This approach allows for future development within the role, ensuring that compensation can be adjusted to reflect an individual's advancing skills and contributions to the team while maintaining internal fairness.
  
Overview


Application

**LeanData helps the world’s fastest\-growing companies automate, simplify, and accelerate revenue.**
We are seeking a GTM Engineer (Data \& AI) to be the lead architect of our autonomous revenue engine. This is a critical role focused on building the Data and Context layers that serve as the "brain" for our AI strategy. We aren't just looking for someone to manage tools, we want a builder who can accelerate our agentic GTM automation, where workflows don't just follow rules, but reason through signals to power the entire customer journey.


You will be empowered to use your technical depth to design, test, and scale a system that eliminates manual friction and turns the funnel into a high\-velocity machine. This is a highly cross\-functional role where you will work directly with GTM VPs to define their growth strategies.


Reporting into the Head of Revenue Operations, you will have a seat at the table with the C\-suite to help define the future of RevOps in the GTM tech industry.


This is a remote opportunity.


**What you will be doing:**

* Architect the GTM Intelligence Foundation. Design and manage a unified data layer that merges structured (DataLake/APIs/MCPs) and unstructured signals (Calls/Emails/Chats) for agentic reasoning and consumption
* Engineer Agentic Workflows. Build autonomous systems that sit in the execution path of the funnel, blending probabilistic AI reasoning with deterministic logic to automate complex decisions across Marketing, Sales, and CX
* Lead our predictive modeling efforts. Own the logic and technical setup for scoring and propensity models ensuring they are integrated into the agentic orchestration layer
* Prototype and Scale GTM Innovation. Rapidly build and test new AI\-native concepts and turn the successful ones into standard operating procedure

**Requirements:**

* Engineering\-First Mindset. 5\+ years in GTM Systems, RevOps, or Data Engineering with a focus on technical workflows. A technical degree or equivalent background is preferred
* Context Orchestrator. You have built complex data flows across Data Warehouses, APIs, and MCP servers and have hands\-on experience building the context layers for AI judgment
* Track record of shipping GTM logic, like scoring, routing, and lifecycle automation, that measurably moved the needle on pipeline or retention.
* Hands\-on experience with modern orchestration platforms and understand how to orchestrate LLMs, enrichment waterfalls, and agentic workflows.
* Possess a structured approach to problem\-solving and a natural instinct to simplify and automate manual processes rather than adding complexity

 **Why work at LeanData:**

* LeanData covers employee insurance premiums up to 90%
* Stock options in LeanData for all full\-time employees
* Flexible PTO
* 401K plan

title: GTM Engineer
description:
SuperDial is building AI\-powered automation to fix broken workflows in healthcare revenue cycle management. We work with fast\-growing healthcare organizations to eliminate manual processes, accelerate cash flow, and free up teams to focus on higher\-impact work. We’re early, ambitious, and execution\-obsessed.


We’re looking for a GTM Engineer who is equal parts operator and builder. This role owns the systems behind our go\-to\-market motion: CRM architecture, attribution, outbound infrastructure, paid acquisition tooling, and the automation layer that ties everything together. You’ll turn strategy into reliable workflows, clean data, and measurable pipeline.


You’ll work closely with leadership and sales to build the revenue data spine, ship fast, test constantly, and create scalable GTM infrastructure from the ground up.

**About the Role**

**CRM Architecture \& Data Hygiene**

* Own our CRM setup and lifecycle logic so reporting reflects reality (not manual fields)
* Define clear stages and handoffs across inbound, outbound, events, partners, and sales
* Implement and maintain CRM hygiene: properties, required fields, routing, and automation
* Build a durable attribution layer (UTMs, source capture, channel normalization) that persists across sessions and forms
* Ensure key funnel milestones can be measured and tied to pipeline outcomes

**GTM Tooling \& Automation**

* Own and manage the GTM tech stack (CRM, enrichment, outbound tools, analytics, paid platforms)
* Build automated workflows across inbound and outbound systems using APIs, webhooks, and native integrations
* Maintain clean data, tracking, and dashboards for leadership and sales
* Create repeatable systems so campaigns and programs run with low operational overhead

**Outbound Infrastructure (Email \+ LinkedIn)**

* Own outbound infrastructure across Apollo, Clay\-powered enrichment workflows, and LinkedIn automation tooling
* Build scalable targeting, segmentation, and personalization workflows
* Manage deliverability and sending health as a core growth lever
* Continuously test new signals, triggers, and automations to improve conversion and meeting quality

**Paid Acquisition Infrastructure**

* Own paid acquisition systems end\-to\-end from tracking to reporting
* Implement conversion instrumentation and ensure paid attribution connects to downstream pipeline
* Build audience logic and retargeting tied to lifecycle stage and CRM data
* Partner with creative/resources as needed, but own the performance infrastructure and measurement

**Experimentation \& Performance**

* Monitor funnel performance across inbound, outbound, paid, events, and partner channels
* Run experiments and A/B tests across tracking, routing, targeting, and conversion paths
* Identify bottlenecks and build systems that reduce leakage and improve speed\-to\-lead
* Share insights clearly with leadership and sales and ship improvements quickly

**About You**

* Experience in GTM engineering, technical growth, RevOps, or highly technical growth operations
* Strong hands\-on experience with HubSpot (or Salesforce) and modern GTM stacks
* Direct experience with outbound tooling and enrichment workflows (Apollo/Clay \+ related systems)
* Comfortable working with data, attribution, and funnel reporting
* Familiar with APIs, webhooks, and systems integrations (light scripting a plus)
* Fast learner who thrives in ambiguity and likes building from scratch

**Bonus Points**

* Experience scaling outbound infrastructure and deliverability
* Experience owning paid acquisition measurement and attribution
* SQL, Python, or strong technical analytics skills
* Experience in B2B SaaS or healthcare
* Experience supporting sales teams and improving pipeline conversion

**Compensation**


Base salary for this role is $125,000\. We also offer equity and benefits as part of our total compensation package. Final offers may vary based on experience and qualifications — we’re always open to exceptional talent.

**Why SuperDial?**


Be part of a mission\-driven team transforming one of the most broken systems in the U.S. Work directly with experienced founders and senior operators in AI, healthcare, and automation. Join us and help shape the future of AI in healthcare.

title: Senior Growth Engineer
description:
Apollo.io is the leading go\-to\-market solution for revenue teams, trusted by over 500,000 companies and millions of users globally, from rapidly growing startups to some of the world's largest enterprises. Founded in 2015, the company is one of the fastest growing companies in SaaS, raising approximately $250 million to date and valued at $1\.6 billion. Apollo.io provides sales and marketing teams with easy access to verified contact data for over 210 million B2B contacts and 35 million companies worldwide, along with tools to engage and convert these contacts in one unified platform. By helping revenue professionals find the most accurate contact information and automating the outreach process, Apollo.io turns prospects into customers. Apollo raised a series D in 2023 and is backed by top\-tier investors, including Sequoia Capital, Bain Capital Ventures, and more, and counts the former President and COO of Hubspot, JD Sherman, among its board members.

#### **Your Role \& Mission**



We’re looking for a **Senior****Growth Engineer** to join our team and accelerate our product’s growth through rapid experimentation, data analysis, and scalable technical solutions. You’ll work at the intersection of engineering, product, and marketing to optimize funnels, automate growth loops, and implement features that drive measurable impact.


#### **Daily Adventures \& Responsibilities**


* **Own and drive growth initiatives end\-to\-end** — identify opportunities, design experiments, ship solutions, and measure impact on key metrics (NRR, GRR, CAC, activation, and expansion).
* **Design and implement experimentation frameworks** (A/B testing, feature flags, instrumentation) to ensure reliable measurement and fast iteration.
* **Collaborate cross\-functionally** with Product, Marketing, Data, and Engineering to translate growth hypotheses into shipped, measurable features.
* **Leverage data and AI** to personalize user experiences, optimize engagement, and reduce friction across the user journey.
* **Raise the technical bar** by ensuring growth experiments are production\-quality, performant, secure, and maintainable.
* **Act as a technical leader** in growth — influencing roadmap decisions, mentoring others, and helping define best practices for experimentation and analytics.
* **Develop and execute engineering strategies** that enable rapid experimentation and data\-driven decision\-making.
* **Architect and build scalable systems** that support growth initiatives, such as onboarding flows, personalization engines, and viral loops.
* **Ensure technical excellence** through best practices in performance optimization, security, and scalability.

#### **Skills \& Relevant Experience**


* 7\+ years of professional software engineering experience, with significant ownership of shipped product features.
* Strong **full\-stack experience,** including:
	+ Frontend: JavaScript/Typescript, React
	+ Backend: RoR, Node.js, Python, or similar
	+ Databases, APIs, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
* Hands\-on experience with **analytics and experimentation:**
	+ A/B testing frameworks (e.g LaunchDarkly, Optimizely, Amplitude, Google Analytics, or custom)
	+ Analytics platforms (Amplitude, Mixpanel, statsig, etc)
* Proven ability to **use data to drive decisions**, not just report on it
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* **AI \& Modern Tooling**
	+ Practical experience using AI/LLMs to:
		- Accelerate development
		- Build product features
		- Improve productivity
* **Mindset:**
	+ **Outcome\-oriented:** You care about business impact, not just shipping code
	+ **Experimental**: You’re comfortable forming hypothesis, testing quickly, and iterating based on real data
	+ **Biased toward action:** You thrive in ambiguity and move forward with imperfect information
	+ **Metrics\-driven:** Obsession with metrics (LTV, CAC, retention) and rapid iteration
	+ **High ownership:** You treat growth problems as yours to solve
* **Nice\-to\-Haves:**
	+ Experience on a growth, product\-led, or experimentation team
	+ Background at a startup or scaling product
	+ Prior experience mentoring or leading engineers in ambiguous problem spaces

**Key Characteristics of Growth Engineers**


* **Entrepreneurial**: Independent, resourceful, and proactive in seeking growth opportunities.
* **Experimental**: Willing to test hypotheses and iterate on strategies based on real\-world feedback.
* **Data\-Driven**: Focused on analyzing data to inform decisions and measure success.
* **Curious**: Always learning and exploring new technologies and methods to drive growth.


**Our tech stack** is React/Redux/NodeJS on the frontend, Ruby/Ruby on Rails/MongoDB/Elasticsearch on the backend, and Kubernetes/Docker/Ansible/Terraform in infrastructure.


**Apollo.io Tech Blog****:** Deep dives into engineering, product design, and company\-culture stories from the Apollo team, offering behind\-the\-scenes insight into how Apollo builds and scales its B2B sales platform.



The listed Pay Range reflects the total cash compensation inclusive of annual base salary and annual bonus as applicable. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings ("OTE") range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonus target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Apollo and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and location. Applicants interested in this role who are not located in the US may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process.



Additional benefits for this role may include: equity; company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; 401(k) plan; at least 10 paid holidays per year, flex PTO, and parental leave; employee assistance program and wellbeing benefits; global travel coverage; life/AD\&D/STD/LTD insurance; FSA/HSA and medical, dental, and vision benefits.

**Tier 1 Pay Range (San Francisco, New York City, Seattle)**
$218,600 \- $300,000 USD**Tier 2 Pay Range (All other US Locations)**
$190,100 \- $260,000 USD### **We are AI Native**



Apollo.io is an AI\-native company built on a culture of continuous improvement. We’re on the front lines of driving productivity for our customers—and we expect the same mindset from our team. If you're energized by finding smarter, faster ways to get things done using AI and automation, you'll thrive here.


### **Why You’ll Love Working at Apollo**



At Apollo, we’re driven by a shared mission: to help our customers unlock their full revenue potential. That’s why we **take extreme ownership** of our work, **move with focus and urgency**, and **learn voraciously** to stay ahead.



We invest deeply in your growth, ensuring you have the resources, support, and autonomy to **own your role and make a real impact**. Collaboration is at our core—we’re **all for one**, meaning you’ll have a team across departments ready to help you succeed. We encourage **bold ideas and courageous action**, giving you the freedom to experiment, take smart risks, and drive big wins.



If you’re looking for a place where your work matters, where you can push boundaries, and where your career can thrive—Apollo is the place for you.

title: Lead GTM Engineer
description:
**TL;DR:** We're hiring a Lead GTM Engineer to work directly with our Head of Growth to scale Listen from $XX $XXX ARR. You're a technical, systems\-oriented, and energetic operator who's excited to join a fast\-growing, early\-stage startup in a career\-defining role. You're willing to roll up your sleeves – no task is too small when it helps move the company forward.


Min. 5\+ years in GTM operations, sales engineering, or RevOps, ideally with experience building outbound motions and SDR systems. Prior experience in technical sales, data engineering, or growth/marketing operations is a plus.

**Background**


Listen Labs is an AI\-powered research platform that helps teams uncover insights from customer interviews in hours — not months. We help customers analyze conversations, surface themes, and make faster, smarter product decisions.

**Company highlights — entirely product\-led:**

* **World\-Class Team:** Founded by serial entrepreneurs (previous AI exit), former co\-founders, and talent from Jane Street, Twitter, Stripe, Affirm, Bain, Goldman Sachs, and many more Sequoia\-backed startups (plus IOI/ICPC backgrounds).
* **Hypergrowth:** We’re a 30\-person team backed by Sequoia, growing from $0 to a $12M run\-rate in under a year. We move fast, care deeply about craft, and love working with people who take ownership.
* **Traction:** Rapid growth across segments with enterprise wins at Google, Microsoft, Nestlé, and P\&G.
* **Performance:** Industry\-leading win rate driven by a highly differentiated product.
* **Market Validation:** Consistently winning customers across all segments with over six\-figure lands that lead to quick expansions.
* **Viral Product:** Interviews are shared with tens of thousands of viewers, fueling PLG, organic expansion, and daily inbound from Fortune 500s.

**What You’ll Do**

* **Outbound infrastructure:** Design and build scalable systems for prospecting, enrichment, and outreach – owning the technical backbone of our outbound motion from data pipelines to automation workflows.
* **SDR enablement \& optimization:** Equip SDRs with world\-class tooling, playbooks, and data insights to maximize efficiency and conversion rates across the funnel.
* **Data \& targeting strategy:** Build ICP models, scoring frameworks, and segmentation logic to ensure outbound efforts are laser\-focused on high\-intent, high\-fit accounts.
* **Tech stack ownership:** Evaluate, implement, and optimize GTM tools (CRM, sequencing, enrichment, intent data) to create a seamless, high\-performance outbound engine.
* **Performance analytics:** Track, analyze, and report on outbound metrics – from reply rates to pipeline contribution – and drive continuous improvement through experimentation and iteration.
* **Cross\-functional alignment:** Work with Heads of Growth, Sales, Product, and Engineering to ensure outbound systems integrate seamlessly with broader GTM strategy and product capabilities.

**Who You Are**

* You're a tooling expert, opinionated about best\-in\-class GTM tech stacks and experienced in evaluating, implementing, and optimizing tools that drive outbound performance at scale.
* You're hands\-on and resourceful, comfortable shifting between high\-level strategy and execution, from designing data models to writing SQL queries or automation scripts yourself.
* You're highly analytical and creative, able to blend technical problem\-solving with strategic thinking about go\-to\-market efficiency and scale.
* You care deeply about craft and impact, not just output. You take pride in doing great work, even on small details.
* You're curious and collaborative, eager to learn from teammates across functions and energized by talking to SDRs and sales reps to understand their workflows and build systems that drive results.

**Life at Listen Labs**

* **Competitive Compensation:** We’re backed by world\-class investors, including Sequoia Capital, Conviction, AI Grant, and Pear VC, and offer competitive compensation packages with meaningful equity ownership.


	+ Over $30B in market cap has been created in adjacent industries (Medallia, AlphaSense, GLG, Ipsos, Kantar). Our Sequoia partner, Bryan Schreier, was the first investor in Qualtrics – a $12B company tackling similar problems to ours.
* **Benefits that Support You:** Comprehensive healthcare and dental coverage, flexible time off to recharge, and an environment that values balance and trust.
* **Room to Grow:** As an early member of the team, you’ll have the opportunity to have end\-to\-end ownership over new responsibilities, shape processes from scratch, and grow alongside the company. We value people who want to stretch beyond their role and build something lasting.

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**ABOUT THE JOB:**


Tapcheck is scaling rapidly, and our revenue teams need intelligent automation to move faster and smarter. As our GTM AI Engineer, you'll be the architect who designs and deploys AI\-powered solutions across BDRs, Marketing, Sales, Channel, and Customer Success. You'll build the intelligent systems that transform manual processes into automated workflows, surface actionable insights from our data, and give every rep a productivity multiplier. Reporting to the VP of Revenue Operations, you'll own the AI and automation roadmap that drives pipeline efficiency, accelerates deal velocity, and improves customer outcomes. If you'reenergized by the challenge of applying cutting\-edge AI to real revenue problems in a high\-growth fintech environment, this is your opportunity to make a measurable impact.

**This role offers both a remote and hybrid option.** Employees located within 30 miles of Plano TX, are required to be in\-office Tuesday through Thursday each week. Those residing beyond this radius may be considered for a fully remote arrangement, depending on experience and business needs.

**What You’ll Do:**


AI\-Powered Revenue Automation – Design and deploy intelligent workflows that automate repetitive tasks across the GTM organization. You'll build systems that auto\-enrich leads, generate personalized outreach, predict deal outcomes, and flag accounts requiring intervention, turning hours of manual work into automated intelligence.


BDR \& Sales Productivity Tools – Create AI agents that research accounts, synthesize competitive intelligence, and generate talking points before every call. Surface deal risks, recommend next steps, and help reps prioritize their pipeline.


Marketing \& Channel Intelligence – Develop AI\-driven attribution insights and campaign optimization. You'll automate lead scoring models, partner routing logic, and channel performance reporting.


Customer Success Automation – Build churn prediction models, expansion opportunity identification, and automated QBR deck generation that pulls real\-time account data into polished presentations. You'll extend our automation capabilities into proactive customer health monitoring and intervention triggers.


Integration \& Systems Architecture – Work hand\-in\-hand with RevOps and Systems to integrate AI capabilities into Salesforce, Gong, HubSpot, and our broader tech stack. You'll ensure solutions are production\-ready, scalable, and adopted by end users.

 **What You’ll Bring:**


Experience – 3\-5 years building AI/ML solutions or intelligent automation in a B2B SaaS, fintech, or revenue operations context. You've shipped production systems that real users rely on daily.


Technical Skills – Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and modern AI/ML frameworks. Experience with LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, etc.), prompt engineering, and building AI agents. Familiarity with workflow automation tools (Clay, n8n, Zapier) and data pipelines.


Revenue Acumen – You understand the GTM motion—how leads flow, deals progress, and customers expand. You can translate business problems into technical solutions that move metrics like conversion rates, deal velocity, and retention.


Systems \& Tools – Deep familiarity with Salesforce and the modern revenue tech stack (Gong, HubSpot, Outreach, ZoomInfo). You're comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and building integrations that connect disparate systems.


Data\-Driven – You don't just build tools, you measure their impact. You know how to baseline processes, track time savings, and make a compelling case for automation ROI.


Communication \& Collaboration – You can translate complex technical concepts for non\-technical stakeholders. You're equally comfortable whiteboarding architecture with engineers and demo'ing solutions to sales leadership.


Bias for Action – You thrive in fast\-paced environments where priorities shift quickly. You're scrappy, resourceful, and comfortable shipping 80/20 solutions that improve over time.

 ***At this time, Tapcheck does not provide sponsorship for employment\-based visas (e.g., H\-b, L\-1, TN, etc.). Therefore, candidates must already possess the right to work in the United States without the need for employment\-based visa sponsorship now or in the future.***

title: Growth Engineer - GTM Systems & Integrations
description:
Salary Range: $110,000\.00 \- $150,000\.00 per year base salary (which is dependent on a variety of factors including relevant experience, geographic location, business needs, and market demand).

### **Who We Are**


Persado is an innovative Marketing AI platform that integrates high\-performance creative generation with automated review of compliance risks. Used by 8 out of the top 10 US banks today, the Persado platform orchestrates collaboration between marketing and compliance teams as they generate content that balances performance and compliance risk.


Persado is at the forefront of empowering marketing teams in highly regulated industries—such as banking, insurance, and telecommunications \- to create and optimize content with speed, compliance, and confidence. Our platform enables enterprise copywriters and marketers to generate and deliver personalized timely, compliant content across channels with unparalleled efficiency, automation, and measurable business impact. As an employer, Persado is committed to creating a place where everyone’s unique perspective is valued. We understand that our team members and our inclusive culture are what make Persado special. Persado is proud to be named on Fast Company’s World’s Most Innovative Companies list in 2020 and Built In’s Best Places To Work in 2021, 2022 \& 2024\.

**Requirements**

### **What We Are Looking For**


We are creating a **Growth Engineer role** to build the technical foundation of Persado’s go\-to\-market system.


This is **not a RevOps**, tooling admin, or reporting role.  

This is a **systems\-engineering role** focused on data flows, automation logic, experimentation infrastructure, and GTM intelligence.


You will report directly to the CRO and operate as a core builder — designing the pipelines and logic that power acquisition, expansion, partnerships, and revenue insight.

### **What You Will Work On**

* Architect and implement Persado’s GTM systems as a cohesive technical platform, not a collection of tools.
* Design and maintain event\-driven data flows across CRM, engagement, intelligence, and analytics layers.
* Build and own:
* + Account, contact, and company\-level data models
	+ Signal ingestion pipelines (intent, activity, competitive, technographic)
	+ Automated segmentation and cohort login
	+ Lead, account, and opportunity lifecycle orchestration
* Integrate and extend systems such as Salesforce, Attio, Gong, Mailcharts, PhantomBuster, BuiltWith, and internal data sources.
* Write automation logic and scripts to:
* + Extract and normalize external data
	+ Enrich accounts and contacts at scale
	+ Trigger GTM actions based on behavior and signals
* Enable rapid experimentation by building infrastructure that supports:
* + ICP testing
	+ Messaging and channel experiments
	+ Motion\-based routing and scoring
	+ Revenue attribution and cohort analysis
* Partner closely with Sales, Marketing, and Partnerships to translate GTM strategy into executable systems.

Own system reliability, data quality, and observability across the GTM stack.  
* 

### **What You Bring**

* 5\+ years of experience in Growth Engineering, GTM Engineering, or Data\-driven Growth roles within SaaS or B2C technology companies.
* Strong technical orientation — comfortable building systems, not just configuring tools.
* Hands\-on experience with:
* + CRM platforms (Salesforce, Attio)
	+ Revenue intelligence tools (Gong or similar)
	+ Data extraction / automation tools (PhantomBuster, APIs, scraping frameworks)
	+ Competitive and technographic intelligence (Mailcharts, BuiltWith)
* Ability to work with APIs, structured and semi\-structured data, and automation pipelines.
* Familiarity with scripting or low\-code / no\-code automation environments (Python, JS, Zapier\-like tools, etc.).
* Strong data modeling instincts and an understanding of lifecycle\-driven GTM design.
* Comfortable operating with ambiguity and incomplete requirements — you design the system as you build it.
* Clear communicator who can explain technical tradeoffs to non\-technical stakeholders.

**Benefits**

### **What We Offer**


Achieve your life goals and work goals at Persado!

* Persado’s hybrid working model empowers both remote and in\-office work equitably
* Competitive and equitable compensation
* Generous benefits packages globally
* 401k matching (USA); Pension Scheme (Certain EU locations) to prepare for your future
* We encourage professional growth through our dedicated enablement and training teams, as well as on demand tools and resources
* Employee Enrichment Fund to pursue a passion or upgrade your home office
* Structured onboarding program to ensure a confident start and long\-term success for new hires
* Strong emphasis on career development and mobility, continuous feedback loops and performance management
* Flexible time off to support work\-life harmony (including Summer Fridays and a one week Winter Holiday Break)
* \#PersadoCares: 2 paid Volunteer days per year and charitable donation matching
* Robust Diversity, Inclusion and Belonging initiatives; culture month celebrations, commitment to bias\-free recruitment, community ERGs, and more

*Valuing diversity at Persado means recognizing and respecting human differences and similarities. Persado is committed to diversity with respect to all aspects of employment. All decisions regarding recruitment, hiring, promotion, compensation, employee training and development, and all other terms and conditions of employment, will be made without regard to race, religious beliefs, color, gender identity, sexual orientation, marital status, physical and mental disability, age, ancestry or place of origin.*

*Kindly submit your CV in English*

title: Founding GTM Engineer
description:
### **Founding GTM Engineer**

**Location:** San Francisco, CA (In\-person)


**Compensation:** $100K – $140K • 0\.01% – 0\.10% Equity


We are building the premier software platform designed to help elite engineering teams move faster. Trusted by over 150\+ high\-growth customers and backed by a $4\.2M seed round from top\-tier investors (including Y Combinator), we have maintained double\-digit month\-over\-month growth since mid\-2025\.


As our **Founding GTM (Go\-To\-Market) Engineer**, you will be the bridge between our technical product and our customers. This is a rare "ground floor" opportunity to work directly with our CEO (who scaled multiple teams from $0–$30M ARR) and our CTO (formerly a founding engineer at a successful startup). You aren't just selling; you are shaping how millions of engineers and leaders understand their work.

**What you’ll do:**

* **Build the Engine:** Do whatever it takes across systems, sales, and marketing to build a robust pipeline.
* **Technical Enablement:** Create the assets that close deals—demos, reference architectures, integration guides, and technical documentation.
* **Automate Growth:** Partner with the founders and product team to automate as much of the sales and onboarding process as possible.
* **Define the Playbook:** We are inventing our outbound, pricing, and expansion strategies as we go. You will be a primary architect of these processes.
* **Stay Agile:** One day you’ll be hunting new logos; the next, you’ll be designing a new internal system to streamline our operations.

**Requirements**

* **Software Engineering Background:** You have written production code and possess a deep understanding of modern development workflows, CI/CD, and the SDLC.
* **Exceptional Communication:** You can translate complex technical concepts for both a DevOps engineer and a C\-suite executive.
* **Bias for Action:** You are self\-motivated, comfortable with ambiguity, and wired for speed.
* **Entrepreneurial Spirit:** You are excited about building a company from scratch, not just executing a pre\-set plan.
* **Eligibility:** Must be a US Citizen or current Visa holder.

**Nice\-to\-Haves:**

* Experience selling developer tools, AI/ML platforms, or infrastructure software.
* Prior experience at an early\-stage startup (Seed to Series C), particularly in a Solutions Engineering or founding role.
* Background as a former founder or early technical hire.

**Benefits**

* **Direct Mentorship:** Work daily with founders who have a proven track record of scaling startups to tens of millions in ARR.
* **Founding Equity:** Own a piece of the company you are helping to build.
* **High Impact:** Your work will directly influence the product roadmap and the company’s trajectory.
* **Market Competitive Pay:** A strong base salary and comprehensive benefits package.
* **Trial Period:** We value mutual fit—our hiring process includes a 3\-5 day paid work trial to ensure we’re the right team for you.

**Due to the high volume of applications we anticipate, we regret that we are unable to provide individual feedback to all candidates. If you do not hear back from us within 4 weeks of your application, please assume that you have not been successful on this occasion. We genuinely appreciate your interest and wish you the best in your job search.**

**Commitment to Equality and Accessibility:**


At MLabs, we are committed to offer equal opportunities to all candidates. We ensure no discrimination, accessible job adverts, and providing information in accessible formats. Our goal is to foster a diverse, inclusive workplace with equal opportunities for all. If you need any reasonable adjustments during any part of the hiring process or you would like to see the job\-advert in an accessible format please let us know at the earliest opportunity by emailing human\-resources@mlabs.city.


MLabs Ltd collects and processes the personal information you provide such as your contact details, work history, resume, and other relevant data for recruitment purposes only. This information is managed securely in accordance with MLabs Ltd’s Privacy Policy and Information Security Policy, and in compliance with applicable data protection laws. Your data may be shared only with clients and trusted partners where necessary for recruitment purposes. You may request the deletion of your data or withdraw your consent at any time by contacting legal@mlabs.city.

title: Growth Engineer (GE) - Citizens Only
description:

PCR Educator delivers the mission\-critical digital backbone for elite educational institutions. This role exists to create momentum: you identify high\-intent pain, translate it into a crisp technical narrative, and turn skepticism into conviction through demos, prototypes, and quantified ROI.

**What You Will Do**

* **Outbound technical evangelism:** Partner with GTM leadership to target accounts, craft technical angles for outreach, and convert first conversations into credible technical next steps.
* **High\-velocity discovery:** Run sharp, time\-boxed discovery calls that surface operational friction, data constraints, and buying triggers.

* **Pre\-sales enablement:** Produce reusable demo assets, objection handling, and technical one\-pagers that scale across the pipeline.

**Revenue ownership:** Drive technical conversion from initial interest through signature by aligning stakeholders, de\-risking integrations, and establishing implementation confidence.

**Who You Are**

* **Builder credibility:** Degree in Engineering or Computer Science, or a portfolio that demonstrates shipping.
* **AI\-native operator:** You use LLMs, automation agents, and data tooling to compress cycle time and increase output quality.
* **Commercially fluent:** You can explain technical tradeoffs and business outcomes with equal precision.
* **Executive presence:** You lead conversations with senior stakeholders, and you can be firm, concise, and persuasive under pressure.
* **Performance motivated:** You want compensation that is meaningfully linked to measurable impact.

**Working Environment**

* Remote\-first culture that rewards outcomes.
* Occasional travel for high\-stakes campus deep dives and closing motions.

**How to Apply**

We value precision above all else. To apply, please email hr@pcreducator.com with your resume and a brief cover note. To ensure you are as detail\-oriented as this role requires, please follow these instructions exactly:

1 Subject Line: Use the format: FDE Candidate \| \[Your Full Name] \| \[Your zipcode].

2 The First Sentence: Start your email by stating your favorite productivity or AI tool and one sentence on why it makes you more efficient.

Pay: $50,000\.00 \- $100,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* 401(k)
* Employee assistance program
* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Paid time off
* Professional development assistance

Work Location: Remote

title: GTM Engineer
description:
Location


Remote
Employment Type


Full time
Location Type


Remote
Department


Sales
  
**Payabli i**s a next\-generation Payments Infrastructure and Monetization Platform purpose\-built for vertical software companies. Through a single, developer\-friendly API with low\-code embedded payment components, Payabli enables platforms to seamlessly embed, monetize, and operationalize payments—making payments a core part of their platform and business model.
By unifying payment acceptance, payment issuance, and advanced payment operations tooling, Payabli empowers software companies to manage and move money through a single infrastructure stack that delivers total control over the payments experience. Built to scale with PCI DSS 4\.0 and SOC 2\-compliant security, Payabli’s infrastructure delivers enterprise\-grade reliability and trust while leveraging AI\-driven intelligence to enhance visibility, streamline operations, and drive revenue growth.


Backed by leading fintech investors including QED Investors, Fika Ventures, TTV Capital, and Bling Capital, Payabli is setting the standard for embedded payments infrastructure powering the next generation of vertical SaaS.

**The Role**


We're seeking a technically\-minded operator who can supercharge our sales team's efficiency through automation, data optimization, and intelligent tooling. As our Go\-To\-Market Engineer, you'll build and maintain the technical infrastructure that powers our sales motion—from prospect identification and enrichment to outreach automation and pipeline analytics.


This role sits at the intersection of sales operations, data engineering, and growth automation. You'll work directly with our Head of Sales, department heads across operations, marketing, customer success, and AI to identify bottlenecks, implement solutions, and continuously optimize our go\-to\-market engine using modern sales enablement tools and custom integrations.

**What You'll Do:**

**Sales Enablement \& Automation**

* Build and optimize automated workflows for prospect outreach using tools like AmpleMarket, Knode.ai, and other sales engagement platforms
* Integrate and configure AI\-powered sales tools (including Claude integrations and Amigo AI agent) to enhance team productivity
* Create scripts and automations that enrich prospect data, prioritize leads, and personalize outreach at scale
* Implement and maintain integrations between our CRM, sales engagement platforms, and other GTM tools

**Revenue Operations**

* Manage and optimize our sales tech stack to ensure data flows seamlessly between systems
* Build dashboards and reporting that provide actionable insights into pipeline health, conversion metrics, and team performance
* Maintain data hygiene across our CRM and sales tools, implementing validation rules and cleanup processes
* Design and implement lead scoring models, territory assignments, and routing logic

**Prospect Research \& ICP Refinement**

* Develop systematic approaches to identify and qualify prospects that match our ideal customer profile across target verticals
* Build tools and processes for competitive intelligence gathering and market research
* Create data\-driven frameworks for account prioritization and territory planning
* Analyze closed\-won and closed\-lost deals to continuously refine targeting criteria

**Process Optimization \& Experimentation**

* Identify opportunities to eliminate manual work and accelerate the sales cycle through technical solutions
* Run experiments on outreach sequences, messaging variations, and channel optimization
* Document processes and create training materials for sales team adoption of new tools
* Stay current on emerging sales tech and AI tools that could enhance team effectiveness

**Analytics \& Insights**

* Build custom reports and analyses to support sales strategy and forecasting
* Track and report on key GTM metrics including pipeline velocity, conversion rates, and tool ROI
* Provide data\-driven recommendations to sales leadership on resource allocation and strategy
* Create performance benchmarks and accountability frameworks for the sales team

**What You Bring**

**Required:**

* 4\+ years of experience in revenue operations, sales operations, marketing operations, or growth engineering
* Strong technical skills including proficiency with APIs, SQL, and scripting languages (Python, JavaScript, or similar)
* Hands\-on experience with modern sales engagement platforms and CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, Apollo, etc.)
* Demonstrated ability to build automations, integrations, and workflows that drive measurable business impact
* Data analysis skills with ability to translate metrics into actionable insights
* Self\-starter mentality with a bias toward experimentation and continuous improvement
* Excellent project management and stakeholder communication skills

**Preferred:**

* Experience implementing AI\-powered sales tools and LLM integrations
* Background in B2B SaaS, fintech, or payments companies
* Familiarity with vertical SaaS business models and multi\-vertical go\-to\-market strategies
* Experience with data enrichment tools (ZoomInfo, Clearbit, Clay etc.) and intent data platforms
* Knowledge of modern data stack tools (Segment, Fivetran, dbt, etc.)
* Understanding of payment processing or embedded finance concepts

**Why Join Payabli**

* **High\-Impact Role:** Your work will directly accelerate revenue growth and team productivity
* **Technical Autonomy:** Freedom to experiment with new tools and build custom solutions
* **Cross\-Functional Exposure:** Work closely with sales, marketing, product, and data teams
* **Growth Opportunity:** Join a well\-funded company in expansion mode with evolving operational needs
* **Innovation Culture:** Embrace AI and automation to stay at the forefront of modern sales operations

**Compensation \& Benefits**

* Competitive base salary plus performance bonus
* Equity participation
* Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
* 401(k) plan
* Flexible PTO policy
* Remote\-first culture with home office stipend
* Professional development and tool budget

**Payabli** is an equal opportunity employer and values a diverse, inclusive workplace.

**Principals only.** No external agency submissions. Candidates must apply directly; We will not accept submissions from third\-party recruiters or staffing agencies.

**Apply for this Job**

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**About Decagon**


Decagon is the leading conversational AI platform empowering every brand to deliver concierge customer experiences.


Our technology enables industry\-defining enterprises like Avis Budget Group, Block’s Cash App and Square, Chime, Oura Health, and Hunter Douglas to deploy AI agents that power personalized, deeply satisfying interactions across voice, chat, email, SMS, and every other channel.


We’re building a future where customer experiences are being redefined from support tickets and hold music to faster resolutions, richer conversations, and deeper relationships. We’re proud to be backed by world\-class investors who share that vision, including a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, and Index Ventures, along with many others.


We’re an in\-office company, driven by a shared commitment to excellence and velocity. Our values — Just Get It Done, Invent What Customers Want, Winner’s Mindset, and The Polymath Principle — shape how we work and grow as a team.

**About the Team**


Decagon’s Revenue Operations team is a multidisciplinary group of operators combining strategic thinking, analytical rigor, and high\-velocity execution. Covering GTM\-wide strategy, operations and analytics, we are proactive, data\-driven partners to leadership – providing critical insights, driving operational efficiency and getting things done.

 **About the Role**


We are seeking a GTM Engineer to reimagine, automate and optimize the full GTM motion. This is a role for a developer\-minded operator who wants to build custom solutions rather than just manage SaaS configurations. Working closely with senior leadership and field teams, you will integrate best\-in\-class tools and build AI agents to drive efficiencies across the full GTM motion. This is a high\-impact, high\-agency position to shape the GTM strategy of a category\-defining AI company.  

  

We believe in building together and fast. This is a fully in\-office role is based in our San Francisco or New York office 5 days a week.

**In This Role You Will**

* **Optimize the Stack:** lead the technical integration and optimization of external tools (e.g., Salesforce, Clay, Gong, enrichment APIs) into a cohesive, automated engine
* **Build AI Agents:** design and deploy agents that optimize account research, reduce manual data entry, and enhance outbound personalization using various tools \& APIs
* **Engineer Data Flows:** build the webhooks and middleware that sync data between our product, CRM and other internal systems with 100% integrity
* **Programmatic GTM:** partner with leadership to translate sales strategy into automated workflows, custom internal tools, and programmatic outbound campaigns

**Your background looks something like this**

* **Technical Foundation:** 5\+ years in GTM Engineering or technical RevOps. You are comfortable writing code (Python, JS, or SQL) and working with APIs. Prior experience in GTM or Revenue Operations is desirable
* **GTM Expertise:** understanding of the sales funnel \& processes; you understand the business logic behind the data you’re moving
* **Integration Mastery:** track record of stitching together a GTM stack and managing complex data waterfalls
* **Get it done posture:** a bias toward action and building "v1" today. You thrive in the ambiguity of a fast\-paced AI startup
* **Ownership mindset:** end\-to\-end ownership of the GTM infrastructure and the outcomes it produces

 **Benefits**

* Health, dental, and vision insurance
* Take what you need vacation policy
* Career growth opportunities within a fast\-growing AI company

  

**Compensation**


$185,000 \- $235,000 OTE \+ Equity


Compensation Range: $185K \- $235K

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**About Posh**
==============


We are all social creatures, but the dominant “social” companies today have evolved into digital loneliness machines, driving isolation, anxiety, and mental health challenges around the world.


Human connection is lost. Posh is a beacon guiding us back.


Posh enables anyone to build an IRL community based on shared interests, while connecting consumers with the communities of people just like them. Founded by event organizers who were frustrated with the growing loneliness epidemic and the tools available to build their own event brand, we’ve built the ultimate platform for launching, monetizing, and finding IRL communities of people just like you. In just 5 years, Posh has grown to a team of 65, expanded to 7M\+ users, secured $70m in venture funding, and facilitated over $300M in transactions.

**About the Role**
==================


We’re hiring a **GTM Engineer** to build and own the revenue systems that power Sales, Success, and Partnerships. You will report to the Director of Revenue Operations.


This role combines **systems administration and GTM engineering**. You will be the owner of our GTM tools and the builder of the automation and AI agents that remove manual work from our go\-to\-market motion.


Your mandate is to keep core systems stable, clean, and trusted, while continuously engineering workflows and agents that reduce human effort and increase GTM velocity.

**This is an in\-person role based in our New York City office in the heart of SoHo**. Building live experiences and building with soul are important for our customers, and we believe being and working together as a team is the best way for Posh to feel and achieve this. Events on Posh should be fun, alive, and driven with passion and we want to mirror this in our teams every day!

**What You’ll Own:**
====================

**GTM Systems \& Integrations**

* Serve as the primary admin and technical owner for HubSpot \& Planhat
* Evaluate new AI and GTM tools, make recommendations, and implement new tools
* Manage pipelines, lifecycle logic, routing rules, fields, and data models
* Maintain clean data flows and resolve identity and sync issues
* Document systems and train GTM teams to ensure adoption and trust

**Automation \& AI Agents**

* Design, build, and own AI\-driven agents that automate recurring GTM workflows
* Deliver automations that drive core Sales metrics such as inbound lead counts, reply rates, meeting to close win rate, etc., with dashboards and attribution tactics that reflect impact clearly. Bonus if you can successfully source and close deals on a completely automated basis.
* Identify manual GTM work that should not require human intervention and eliminate it
* Build end\-to\-end automations across HubSpot, Planhat, Clay, Zapier, and APIs
* Embed intelligence into routing, enrichment, follow\-ups, alerts, and handoffs
* Measure automation impact in hours saved, speed, and GTM throughput

**What You’ll Bring:**
======================

* 2\-4 years in GTM Engineering, RevOps, SalesOps, Business Systems, or similar role
* Hands\-on experience managing a modern CRM \& workflow tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, etc.)
* Strong understanding of core sales funnel metrics and how to move the needle with automations and AI
* SQL fluency and experience connecting tools to centralized reporting infrastructure
* Strong communication skills to collaborate on systems with non\-technical users
* Comfort with APIs and light scripting in Python or JavaScript

**Nice to Haves**
-----------------

* Experience with Clay, Gong, Default, Unity, Artisan, or similar enrichment platforms
* Experience in marketplaces or B2B2C business models
* Experience owning CRM automations and improvements
* Comfort navigating early\-stage ambiguity and fast execution cycles


Posh provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.


This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.


Posh is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. Please let us know if you need assistance or accommodation due to a disability


Compensation Range: $130K \- $150K

title: GTM Engineer
description:
### **About Actively AI**



Our thesis is that businesses of the future will be powered by agentic human\-in\-loop\-machines that make every business function 10x more efficient.



Actively AI is building that superintelligent machine for Enterprise GTM organizations, focused on increasing productivity per rep. We power the day\-to\-day for outbound teams at dozens of companies like Samsara, Ramp, Verkada, and Ironclad.



Why does this matter? **Because revenue is the ultimate fuel for businesses.** The hundreds of millions of dollars we generate for our customers enables them to employ more people, innovate faster, and deliver more value to *their* customers.



In addition to top\-notch customers that love our product, our team is incredibly high caliber \- the co\-founders are former Stanford AI researchers and the engineering team comes from Harvard, CMU, Berkeley, Brex, Scale AI, and Google. We're also backed by top investors, including Bain Capital Ventures, First Round Capital (seed investors in Uber, Square, Roblox, Clearbit), Lachy Groom, and Stanford AI faculty.



We have a very ambitious product and scaling roadmap, there’s strong market interest in what we are doing, and it’s time to put the foot on the gas. If you get excited by the thought of working really hard on these kinds of problems with a high caliber team, then Actively AI is the right place for you.

### **About the Role**



We are looking for a **GTM Engineer** who is passionate about building scalable systems that sit at the intersection of Revenue Operations, data and AI. You will play a central role in how we design, automate, instrument and evolve our go\-to\-market engine across Sales, Marketing and Account Management.



This is not a support role and not a pure engineering role. It is a **builder role** for someone who continuously challenges the status quo, experiments with new approaches, and translates innovation into tangible outcomes for revenue teams.



You will partner closely with RevOps leadership, GTM leaders and operators across the business. Your work will directly shape how our GTM organisation runs and will be visible at the highest levels.



This role is ideal for someone who:


* Owns outcomes, not tasks
* Demonstrates relentless accountability
* Pushes boundaries in pursuit of better results, not novelty
* Gains energy from enabling teammates to win
* Thrives by elevating others, not by being the hero
* Is obsessed with scaling decision\-making through systems, data and AI


You will play a key role in ensuring **Actively remains ahead of the curve as an AI\-native GTM company**, not by chasing trends, but by thoughtfully translating emerging capabilities into real operational advantage.


### **What You’ll Do**


### **GTM Systems \& Data Architecture**


* Own and evolve our GTM tech stack including Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, Gong, Outreach, Chili Piper, BigQuery, Sigma and automation tooling
* Design and maintain reliable data pipelines that power reporting, automation and AI workflows
* Ensure data quality, consistency and observability across GTM systems
* Partner with RevOps and GTM leaders to translate GTM strategy and operational needs into scalable technical solutions
* Evaluate new tools and platforms, balancing speed, leverage and long\-term maintainability

### **AI Workflows \& GTM Enablement**


* Design and productionise LLM\-powered workflows and internal copilots that materially improve how GTM teams operate
* Identify high\-impact GTM use cases for AI and turn them into practical, adopted capabilities
* Run controlled experimentation to test AI features and workflows before scaling
* Monitor performance, adoption, drift and ROI of AI\-powered systems over time
* Serve as a steward of AI\-native GTM practices, helping Actively stay ahead of the curve as the landscape evolves

### **Process Automation \& Operational Scale**


* Proactively identify friction, bottlenecks and manual effort across GTM processes
* Operationalise process improvements through automation and system redesign
* Build durable workflows that scale with volume, complexity and organisational growth
* Reduce cognitive and operational drag on revenue teams so they can focus on winning customers

### **Tracking, Reporting \& Insight Enablement**


* Build and maintain instrumentation that enables accurate tracking of funnel, pipeline and GTM performance
* Partner with RevOps to ensure metrics are well\-defined, trusted and decision\-useful
* Enable self\-serve insights through well\-designed data models and reporting layers
* Help leadership understand what is happening, why it is happening and where to focus next

### **Thought Leadership \& Point of View**


* Contribute to internal documentation, playbooks and standards that define how we build and operate GTM systems
* Partner with leadership on external thought leadership, including content, talks and published perspectives
* Engage thoughtfully with customers, partners, and the broader ecosystem to exchange ideas and learn from real\-world GTM challenges

### **Who You Are**


* 2–6 years of experience in GTM Engineering, Revenue Operations, Systems Engineering, Analytics Engineering or a similar builder role
* An innovator by instinct, you are constantly looking for better ways to deliver outcomes, not just maintain systems
* Strong systems thinker who naturally think in workflows, data flows, dependencies and failure modes
* Comfortable designing and shipping solutions end\-to\-end, not just maintaining existing setups
* Experience working with GTM systems such as Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, Gong, Outreach, Chili Piper, BigQuery, Sigma or equivalent platforms
* Hands\-on experience designing or deploying LLM\-based workflows for internal business use cases
* Strong SQL skills with experience in Data Engineering and Python scripting
* Able to collaborate effectively with technical specialists including AI engineers, while translating complexity for non\-technical stakeholders
* Clear, professional communicator who operates well in ambiguity and fast\-changing environments

### **Nice to Haves**


* Experience in an early\-stage or high\-growth B2B SaaS environment
* Familiarity with reverse ETL, event tracking, or modern data stack patterns
* Experience evaluating AI vendors, tools or platforms and integrating them into production workflows
* Customer\-facing experience, such as working directly with clients, prospects or partners on GTM or technical problems
* Interest in writing, speaking, or contributing to industry discussions on AI and GTM

### **Why Join**



It’s rare to join a company at a stage where you can meaningfully shape how GTM systems, data and AI are designed from the ground up. Here, you won’t be inheriting a rigid playbook, you’ll be helping to write it. You’ll work alongside a high\-caliber, low\-ego team that values clear thinking, ownership, and impact. You’ll have the autonomy to build, the responsibility to scale, and the opportunity to influence how modern AI\-native GTM teams operate.


### **Benefits**


* Competitive Early\-Stage Equity
+ Health, Dental, Vision Coverage

* Unlimited PTO \+ Recharge Days
* ️ Catered Lunch on Tuesday \& Friday w/ Dinners every day!
* Cutting\-Edge Tech \& Tools
* Annual Off\-sites \& Monthly Events
* Commuter Benefits
* Cozy Office in NYC


*The base salary range for this full\-time position based in New York is: $100,000 \- $160,000\.* *This position is also eligible for variable compensation of $15,000\-$20,000 subject to personal performance, company performance, and the terms of Actively AI’s applicable plans.*


*Note on Pay Transparency:*


*Actively AI provides an estimate of the compensation for roles that may be hired as required by state regulations. Compensation may vary based on (a) location, as Actively AI factors in specific location when benchmarking compensation for most roles; (b) individual candidate skills and qualifications; and (c) individual candidate experience. Additionally, Actively AI leverages current market data to determine compensation, so posted compensation figures are subject to change as new market data becomes available. The salary, other compensation, and benefits information is accurate as of the date of this posting.* *Actively.ai* *reserves the right to modify this information at any time, subject to applicable law.*


*Actively AI is committed to equal treatment and opportunity in all aspects of recruitment, selection, and employment without regard to gender, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, disability, gender identity/expression, sexual orientation, veteran or military status, or any other category protected under the law. Actively AI is an equal opportunity employer; committed to a community of inclusion, and an environment free from discrimination, harassment, and retaliation.*

title: GTM Engineer
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

**About the role**  
As the GTM Engineer, you will build technical solutions to business problems. You will design and own tools that will have a direct impact on sales and productivity. This role is a blend of Revenue Operations and GTM engineering, all relying on an advanced use of AI. Reporting to our VP of Business Operations, this is an individual contributor role with potential for growth into people management.

**Who You Are:**

* **5+ years experience** in revenue operations, GTM engineering, data analytics, management consulting, or similar roles
* **Proficiency in Python and SQL is required**; experience with API integration
* Experience with the **GTM Tech Stack** is a plus, e.g. Salesforce, Outreach, Clay
* Experience with **AI code copilots** is a plus, e.g. Claude Code, Cursor
* Obsessed with automation and eliminating manual work

**What You'll Do:**

* **Build GTM automation tools:** Build tools to increase the efficiency of our sales team. You will focus on specific sales motions and find ways to 10x their impact. You will architect a combination of Python notebooks, n8n workflows, and other tools, to build things such as a referral identification system or a lead scoring model
* **Own Revenue Systems & core GTM processes:** Own operational excellence in key processes including pipeline tracking, process optimization, lead enrichment. Maintain and enhance our revenue tech stack (CRM, automation tools, data platforms)
* **Drive projects from idea -> impact:** Evaluate commercial strategy to surface gaps and drive prioritization across the organization. Partner with Sales and Product to ship GTM innovations with high velocity and ownership

**For SF / IL / NY based applicants:**

* The base salary for this position is $160K - $200K
* This position is eligible for equity in the form of stock options
* This position is eligible for Instawork benefits, including:
* + Medical, dental, and vision plans with coverage beginning on the date of hire
  + Flexible paid time off
  + At least 8 paid company holidays annually
  + Phone stipend
  + Commuter stipend
  + Supplemental pay on qualified leaves
  + Employee health savings accounts (HSA) contribution
  + Flexible spending plans
  + 401K plan
  + Perkspot - discount program through Lumity

A variety of factors are considered when determining someone’s compensation including a candidate’s professional background, experience, and location. Final offer amounts may vary from the amounts listed above.

**Our Values**

* **Empathy, Trust & Candor**  
  We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
* **Bias for Action**  
  We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
* **Always Be Learning**  
  We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
* **Act Like an Owner**  
  We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.

**About Instawork**

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.  
  
Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**Who we are**



We're Redis. We built the product that runs the fast apps our world runs on. (If you checked the weather, used your credit card, or looked at your flight status online today, you're welcome.) At Redis, you'll work with the fastest, simplest technology in the business—whether you're building it, telling its story, or selling it to our 10,000\+ worldwide customers. We're creating a faster world with simpler experiences. You in?

**About the team**
==================



We're a small and fast\-moving team with a simple mandate: remove friction from how Redis goes to market. We build systems, workflows, and AI\-powered tools that help Marketing and SDR teams move faster, work smarter, and generate more pipeline with less manual effort.

  



We're looking for someone who is naturally curious, self\-motivated, and a problem\-solver who thrives in environments where the opportunities for impact are massive, and they get to own the end\-to\-end workstream.


**About the role**
==================



As a GTM Engineer focused on Marketing and SDR teams, you'll sit at the intersection of engineering, automation, and go\-to\-market strategy. Your mission is to identify high\-leverage problems in how we generate demand and engage prospects, and then build solutions that materially improve outcomes.

  



You'll own the full lifecycle:


* Uncovering pain points or inefficiencies with Marketing and SDR teams
* Defining what "better" looks like
* Designing the solution
* Building, shipping, and iterating

  



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both **thinking like a product manager and building like an engineer**—and who wants their work to directly influence pipeline, velocity, and customer engagement.

  



You'll partner closely with Marketing Operations and collaborate with peers across Revenue Operations, Customer Success, and Solutions Architecture to deliver scalable, secure, and measurable improvements to how Redis goes to market.

  


**What you'll do**
==================


* Partner with Marketing and SDR teams to identify, scope, and prioritize high\-impact opportunities for automation and AI.
* Design and build workflows, automations, and data pipelines that make the jobs of the Marketing and SDR teams faster, easier, and/or more productive.
* Explore APIs, SDKs, and emerging AI tools to test new ways of accelerating GTM execution.
* Be equal parts product manager, translating customer needs into features, and an engineer building solutions.
* Balance speed with durability by partnering with operations and systems teams to ensure solutions are secure, maintainable, and scalable.
* Operate with autonomy — owning projects from problem discovery through solution delivery and iteration.

  


**What skills we're looking for**
=================================


**Must have**


* 2–5 years of experience building or supporting GTM systems in a GTM Engineering, Business Technology, Solutions Engineering, or similar role.
* Hands\-on experience applying AI, automation, or APIs to problems (you should be able to walk us through concrete examples).
* Familiarity with modern AI and automation tools (e.g., OpenAI, Cursor, n8n, v0/Vercel, Glean, or similar).
* Strong problem\-solving skills and comfort working through ambiguity.
* A bias for action: you move from idea experiment solution quickly.
* Clear communicator who can work effectively with both technical and non\-technical partners.
* Thrives in a small, high\-growth environment with significant ownership and autonomy.

  


**Nice to have**


* Ability to write prototype\- or production\-level code in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or a similar language.
* Experience with GTM platforms such as Salesforce, Marketo, Pocus, Asana, or related tools.
* Exposure to experimentation, analytics, or performance measurement in a GTM context.

  


*The estimated gross base annual salary range for this role is* *$90,000* *–* *$125,000* *per year in New York, California, Washington, Colorado, and Rhode Island. Actual compensation may vary and is dependent on various factors, including a candidate's work location, qualifications, experience, and competencies. Base annual salary is one component of Redis' total compensation and competitive benefits package, which may include 401(k), unlimited time off, learning and development opportunities, and comprehensive health and wellness benefits. This role may include discretionary bonuses, stock options, commuter benefits based on location, or a commission plan. Salary history is not used in compensation package decisions. Redis utilizes market pay data to determine compensation, so posted compensation ranges are subject to change as new market data becomes available.*

title: Go-To-Market Engineer (Success Architect), Scaled
description:
Apollo.io is the leading go\-to\-market solution for revenue teams, trusted by over 500,000 companies and millions of users globally, from rapidly growing startups to some of the world's largest enterprises. Founded in 2015, the company is one of the fastest growing companies in SaaS, raising approximately $250 million to date and valued at $1\.6 billion. Apollo.io provides sales and marketing teams with easy access to verified contact data for over 210 million B2B contacts and 35 million companies worldwide, along with tools to engage and convert these contacts in one unified platform. By helping revenue professionals find the most accurate contact information and automating the outreach process, Apollo.io turns prospects into customers. Apollo raised a series D in 2023 and is backed by top\-tier investors, including Sequoia Capital, Bain Capital Ventures, and more, and counts the former President and COO of Hubspot, JD Sherman, among its board members.


As a Scaled GTM Engineer, you are a **scaled interventionist**: part workflow builder, part signal translator, part credit\-consumption driver. You design and deploy Apollo\-native lead generation workflows for multiple accounts per week — fast, repeatable, and measurable.



You thrive in high\-volume execution, using Apollo’s AI features, enrichment, and campaign logic to identify interventions that quickly improve customer outcomes.


#### ***Who you are…***


* 2–4 years experience in RevOps, SDR Ops, or onboarding roles
* Proven ability to manage *high\-volume client engagements* (client\-facing)
* Deep Lead Gen fluency — sequencing, enrichment, workflows, analytics
+ Bonus if that experience includes Apollo

* Obsessed with velocity: fast execution, measurable results
* Comfort working in distributed team environments

#### ***Apply if you’re a…***


* **Velocity Operator**: You thrive in fast\-moving environments. Handling 20\+ accounts in parallel energizes you, and you know how to get to outcomes quickly without sacrificing quality.
* **Product Native**: You’re fluent in Apollo. Sequencing, enrichment, workflows, analytics — these are second nature, and you can configure them on the fly.
* **Time\-Boxed Builder**: You don’t need weeks to architect a system. You can spin up, test, and optimize a workflow in hours, then move on to the next.
* **Pattern Spotter**: You can look across multiple accounts and quickly identify repeatable fixes — templatizing interventions so every customer benefits faster.
* **Execution Athlete**: You’d rather run 10 sprints in a day than one marathon in a month. You love getting things live, iterating, and seeing immediate results.
* **Growth\-Minded**: Maybe you cut your teeth in onboarding, RevOps, or SDR Ops. You want the chance to level up into GTM Engineering by proving you can operate at scale.

#### ***What You’ll Do…***


* Rapidly assess usage signals across floating accounts and design lightweight interventions  

Execute outbound/inbound campaign setups, sequencing, enrichment, and AI prompt workflows
* Manage time across 20–30 active client touchpoints at once; Hundreds per year
* Identify common GTM patterns and templatize solutions for reuse across the scaled customer base


***In a Nutshell…***
  

  

A go\-to\-market\-native builder who speaks native inbound/outbound sales, thinks in systems, and codes growth.


The listed Pay Range reflects the total cash compensation inclusive of annual base salary and annual bonus as applicable. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings ("OTE") range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonus target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Apollo and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and location. Applicants interested in this role who are not located in the US may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process.



Additional benefits for this role may include: equity; company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; 401(k) plan; at least 10 paid holidays per year, flex PTO, and parental leave; employee assistance program and wellbeing benefits; global travel coverage; life/AD\&D/STD/LTD insurance; FSA/HSA and medical, dental, and vision benefits.

**Tier 1 Pay Range (San Francisco, New York City, Seattle)**
$108,000 \- $140,000 USD**Tier 2 Pay Range (All other US Locations)**
$96,000 \- $130,000 USD### **We are AI Native**



Apollo.io is an AI\-native company built on a culture of continuous improvement. We’re on the front lines of driving productivity for our customers—and we expect the same mindset from our team. If you're energized by finding smarter, faster ways to get things done using AI and automation, you'll thrive here.


### **Why You’ll Love Working at Apollo**



At Apollo, we’re driven by a shared mission: to help our customers unlock their full revenue potential. That’s why we **take extreme ownership** of our work, **move with focus and urgency**, and **learn voraciously** to stay ahead.



We invest deeply in your growth, ensuring you have the resources, support, and autonomy to **own your role and make a real impact**. Collaboration is at our core—we’re **all for one**, meaning you’ll have a team across departments ready to help you succeed. We encourage **bold ideas and courageous action**, giving you the freedom to experiment, take smart risks, and drive big wins.



If you’re looking for a place where your work matters, where you can push boundaries, and where your career can thrive—Apollo is the place for you.

title: GTM Engineer (Go-to-Market Systems & Automations)
description:
**GTM Engineer (Go-to-Market Systems & Automations)**
=====================================================

**(Austin, TX)**

### **About Atmosphere:**

Atmosphere is the leading streaming TV platform built specifically for businesses. Unlike ad networks or signage companies, Atmosphere is the only true TV company whose first priority is to entertain television audiences outside of the home. Our content is designed to be fun, engaging, and worth watching, transforming waiting rooms, gyms, bars, and restaurants into better experiences for customers and better businesses for owners.

We are the first and only company to think about both the business owner and their customers when creating TV content. With 60,000+ venues and a global audience of over 150 million monthly viewers, Atmosphere is redefining what TV means outside the living room.

### **About the Role:**

We’re seeking a GTM Engineer (Go-to-Market Engineer) who blends strong technical execution with practical sales and marketing intuition to help scale Atmosphere’s global expansion across bars, restaurants, gyms, airports, and other commercial venues. This is a hybrid role at the intersection of sales, marketing, and product, with a strong emphasis on hands-on engineering ownership of the systems and automations that power our go-to-market motion. You’ll design and build the systems, automations, and AI-powered workflows that power our business acquisition engine, serving as the technical architect behind how venues are identified, onboarded, and activated at scale. Your work will directly shape how efficiently and effectively Atmosphere gets into more businesses around the world.

*This position will report to the SVP, Platform Sales & Marketing, and is on-site in Austin, TX. Availability to be in-office 4 days a week is required.*

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Engineer scalable growth solutions by building integrations, automations, and tools that streamline venue acquisition, onboarding & customer support for bars, restaurants, gyms, airports, and other commercial locations.
* Leverage AI coding agents and modern development tools to rapidly prototype and deploy go-to-market experiments.
* Analyze complex data sets to identify growth opportunities and build dashboards that drive decision-making.
* Build and scale cold email systems for venue outreach, leveraging automation tools to reach bars, restaurants, gyms, and airports globally.
* Design and implement A/B tests, attribution models, and performance tracking systems.
* Build custom tools and workflows that enhance team productivity and campaign effectiveness.
* Create technical solutions for global market expansion, venue onboarding automation, and business retention initiatives across diverse commercial environments.
* Collaborate across departments to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Drive data-driven experimentation to optimize venue acquisition funnels and reduce the cost of onboarding new business locations worldwide.

### **Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience in Engineering, Computer Science, Data, or a related technical field.
